location: Random drop from spear-wielding Fallen Hawk Soldiers around Nokron, Eternal City — several cluster behind the church near the entrance grace, with more in the graveyard and along the path toward the Mimic Tear grace.
tactics: Nokron is reached by falling into Starfall Crater (revealed near Mistwood after defeating Starscourge Radahn), or via the connected Siofra River underground route
Fallen Hawk Soldiers layer cold ghostflame magic on top of their spear jabs, so watch for frostbite buildup
Drop rate is a low 2%, so the cluster of three behind the entrance church is the most efficient farm spot
Don't confuse Nokron with the visually similar Siofra River area directly below it — they're connected but have separate grace networks
lore: An unremarkable, rust-pitted iron spear with nothing special to its make — the kind of common arm any rank-and-file soldier might carry.

builds.name: Early quality build
builds.why: Cheap even D/D Strength-Dexterity requirements make it a solid budget quality spear for the early-to-mid game
